title: tanacetum albanicum
intro: Tanacetum albanicum, also known as Albanian tansy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum albanicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum albanicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
